pageDescription: Export workspace data to an encrypted file, or restore it from an archive.
ownerOnly: Exporting and importing workspace data is only available to the workspace owner.
exportCardDescription: Save the selected workspace sections to an encrypted .inspot-backup file.
importCardDescription: Restore workspace data from a previously created .inspot-backup file.
passphraseTooShortError: Passphrase must be at least 10 characters
modeMergeDescription: New records are added alongside existing data. Duplicates (webhook tokens and provider resource bindings) are skipped.
modeReplaceDescription: Data for the sections included in the archive will be deleted and replaced with its contents.
replaceConfirmDescription: Data for the sections included in the archive will be permanently replaced with its contents. This action cannot be undone.

errors.BACKUP_INVALID_FILE: The file is corrupt or is not an Inspoter backup.
errors.BACKUP_UNSUPPORTED_VERSION: This archive's format is not supported by the current version of the app.
errors.BACKUP_PASSPHRASE_INVALID_OR_CORRUPT: The passphrase is incorrect or the archive file is corrupt.
errors.BACKUP_TOO_LARGE: The archive file exceeds the maximum allowed size.
errors.BACKUP_SECRET_DECRYPT_FAILED: Could not decrypt one of the workspace's secrets.
errors.ENCRYPTION_NOT_CONFIGURED: Encryption is not configured on the server. Contact an administrator.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
